title: Physics of Interstellar Space Travel (MVSem)
further_info: Recommended Reading The recommend text is my textbook The Physics of Interstellar Travel (https://bailer-jones.www3.mpia.de/pit.html). This will be published open access in May 2026. Prior to that I can give course participants access to an uncorrected draft version of the book. online information course documents The course will be held in English. For more up-to-date (will be added before the course starts), see the course website at https://bailer-jones.www3.mpia.de/pit_ss2026.html
